/usr/bin/ar qc libengine.a CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/chess_clock.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/debug_hashtable.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/evaluation.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/game.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/generated_data.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/history_table.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/move.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/opening_book.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/perft_results.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/pins.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/position.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/search_alphabeta.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/search_quiescent.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/search_root_node.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/static_exchange_evaluation.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/transposition_table.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libengine.a
